case_title: WALTER J. LEDBETTER VS. INGERSOLL-RAND COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: COURT TRIAL HELD ON AUG-01-2006. SETTLED. JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS, WALTER LEDBETTER, DANIEL BAREMORE, HENRY CLARENCE BURNETTE, JOSEPH ALLAN COOKE, CLARICE GANDOLFO AND PAUL JOHNSON AND AGAINST DEFENDANT INGERSOLL-RAND COMPANY IN THE AMOUNT OF $72,100.00, INTEREST IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,000, AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $340.35, FOR A TOTAL OF $82,440.35. POST-JUDGMENT INTEREST HEREINAFTER ACCRUES FROM DATE OF ENTRY OF THIS JUDGMENT TO DATE OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT WILL NOT BE FILED UNLESS AFTER 75 DAYS, THE TOTAL AMOUNT HAS NOT BEEN PAID. JUDGE J.MUNTER;REPORTER R.AQUILINA;CLERK T.MARUYAMA (505)
